name: MPT-7B
archDisplay: Decoder-only Transformer, no positional embeddings (ALiBi), FlashAttention; 32L/32H, d_model 4096
note: Apache-2.0 decoder-only transformer trained from scratch on 1T tokens; ALiBi removes fixed context limits, FlashAttention for efficient training/inference.

verificationNotes: Existence, org, release date (2023-05-05), 6.7B params, 32L/32H/d4096 architecture, Apache-2.0 license, 2048 native context (ALiBi-extendable), and 1T training tokens all corroborated via HF model card searches and the official Databricks/MosaicML announcement blog.
